title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 82.630 - Appointment of additional clerical help
text:
82.630.  Appointment of additional clerical help. — In addition to the above designated appointees, the collector of revenue is authorized to appoint and employ such additional temporary clerical help as may be authorized by the comptroller of the city.
(L. 1945 p. 1311 § 4, A.L. 1947 V. II p. 298, A.L. 1949 p. 376, A.L. 1951 p. 351, A.L. 1957 p. 246, A.L. 1963 p. 132, A.L. 1965 p. 196)
